title: goodenia lobata
intro: Goodenia lobata, also known as Native Violet or Wild Violet, is a flowering plant native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The leaves and flowers of Goodenia lobata have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Goodenia lobata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
